creator: smurf.daemon@mail.smurfd.me
text:
Closing this, today i did a upgrade from a 13.x to 14.1 in a VM, and:
doas pkg bootstrap -f
doas pkg upgrade
reboot

wmaker worked as expected, must have hit some temporary issue before.
if somoene sees this, or i see it again.
try force reinstall libwraster if you are already on 14.1
br smurfd
